title: Ticket 08 - Acceptance & handover
description: Dummy data for Ticket 08 - Acceptance & handover (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.

questions.prompt: In Ticket 08 the subject statement appears: "Classify and apply training company acceptance and handover confidently in everyday work." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand training company acceptance and handover in everyday work and implement it properly.
options.explanation: This captures the core idea of training company acceptance and handover in a direct, actionable way.

options.text: We can ignore training company acceptance and handover as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: Training company acceptance and handover should not be postponed or avoided.

options.text: Only team leads are allowed to deal with training company acceptance and handover.
options.explanation: That makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning intent.

options.text: Training company acceptance and handover only becomes relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning idea is meant to be applied in day-to-day work.

questions.prompt: Which response fits Ticket 08 best for training company acceptance and handover?

options.text: Align briefly, document cleanly, and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency, and actionable execution.

options.text: Note nothing for now and decide later by gut feeling.
options.explanation: Especially for training company acceptance and handover, that would be imprecise and risky.

options.text: Only bring up issues once they have fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right approach is to clarify early instead of escalating late.

options.text: Avoid questions even when the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning intent calls for clarity, not silent guessing.
